description: Evidence that work meets its criteria. Per-task, per-phase, or per-requirement completion evidence. The accountability record linking implementation to acceptance.
title: Verification

target.description: ID of what was verified (task, phase, requirement)

status.description: Verification outcome. Intentionally divergent from pi-context://schemas/status (workflow-shaped); verifications use evidence-shaped outcome semantics (passed/failed/partial/skipped). Reconciliation.

method.description: Verification method. Intentionally narrower subset of pi-context://schemas/verification-method (which is command/grep/ast/inspect/human/test); verifications support only the 3 most common methods. Reconciliation.

evidence.description: What was checked and what was found
